This means as our body matures we
are able to do tasks such as cut with

whatThisLessonMustPrepareStudentsToDo: Apply, write, complete, list, provide, describe in completed assignment booklet responses format for (if label is missing or incorrect) File Number: FOR ADLC USE ONLY.

checksForUnderstanding: Quick retrieval: define and use Learning, Principles, Able in one accurate sentence.
Mini-explanation: explain Learning without reading notes.
Error check: identify a common misconception about Learning and correct it.
guidedPracticeIdeas: Model how to apply using the lesson vocabulary and one cited source example.
Walk through one assignment-booklet prompt from (if label is missing or incorrect) File Number: FOR ADLC USE ONLY and annotate what a successful response has to include.
Have students rehearse a response frame before they write independently.
independentPracticeIdeas: Complete a short practice task in the same assignment-booklet style used by (if label is missing or incorrect) File Number: FOR ADLC USE ONLY.
Use the required vocabulary list without copying a textbook paragraph.
Revise the response using the lesson's misconception and readiness checks.
evidenceOfReadinessForAssessment: Student can apply Learning accurately without reverting to chapter-note summary.
Student uses Learning, Principles, Able in context.
Student completes a practice response that matches the success criteria language from (if label is missing or incorrect) File Number: FOR ADLC USE ONLY.
